relatedComponents.name: Time Date Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system (same font sizes, opacities, tokens, dimensions).

relatedComponents.name: Month Year Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system.

subComponentsNote: No dedicated sub-components. Self-contained single-column scroll picker.

anatomy.description: Outer surface. 375px wide, 212px tall. Background: --surface/neutral/default. No border, no border-radius.
Horizontal stripe centred vertically, spanning the full width. 31px tall. Marks the active selection row. Image asset in Figma.

Single center-aligned column. Displays numeric values (or 'Only me' as the first label in type=travelers). 7 visible slots. Start-of-range positions (1–3) use transparent text color in type=end and type=travelers.

variants.name: end
variants.description: The minimum available value is selected. Positions 1–3 above the selection use text-[transparent] to hide out-of-range slots. Positions 5–7 are visible.

variants.name: middle
variants.description: A value in the middle of the available range is selected. All 7 positions are populated and visible.

variants.name: travelers
variants.description: Like type=end, but the minimum (first) value is a text label 'Only me' rather than a number. Positions 1–3 use text-[transparent]. Positions 5–7 are visible numeric values.

scrollDepthSystem.description: Identical to Time Date Picker and Month Year Picker. Single column shows 7 items. The selected item is always at position 4 (centre). Size and opacity decrease symmetrically toward the edges.
scrollDepthSystem.boundaryMaskingNote: Number Picker uses text-[transparent] (not opacity-0) for start-of-range positions. This differs from Month Year Picker which uses opacity-0.

column.note: TODO: Confirm full range of available values for each use case. TODO: Confirm whether unit suffixes (e.g., 'Passenger') are part of the component or applied externally.

typography.note: Identical to Time Date Picker and Month Year Picker. All items use Regular weight regardless of selection state.

popupContext.triggerComponent: Vehicle details form — 'Select Passenger Capacity' select button
popupContext.confirmAction: "Confirm Vehicle Type" primary button — applies the selection

usageContext: Placed inside a bottom-sheet popup when the user needs to select a quantity or capacity value.
Confirmed in Dojo Driver App: 'Select Passenger Capacity' popup on the Vehicle Details screen (step 2 of 3 in driver account creation).

notes: The scroll depth visual system is identical to Time Date Picker and Month Year Picker — all three must be updated together if the system changes.
The selection indicator is an image asset in Figma — implementation should use a CSS equivalent.
Start-of-range boundary masking uses text-[transparent] (a Tailwind color utility), not opacity-0. Values remain in the DOM but are invisible.
type=travelers uses the same boundary masking as type=end, but replaces the numeric minimum with the text label 'Only me'.
